ModMetaData.name: Combat Extended Patch - BM's Races: Doberkins
ModMetaData.author: Diablood
ModMetaData.description:
Combat Extended compatibility patch for BM's Races: Doberkins.
This patch rebalances weapons, armor, and apparel to match Combat Extended standards while preserving the original gameplay identity.
✔ CE armor recalibration (RHA system) ✔ Weapon stat fixes and improvements ✔ Full apparel rebalance (gloves, boots, packs, masks, clothing) ✔ Royalty integration for noble apparel (High Commander & Shield Commander) ✔ Fixes for apparel behavior and interaction issues
Royalty support is fully optional and has no impact if the DLC is not installed.
Designed for consistency, balance, and immersion with Combat Extended.
